releaseNotes:
• Maintenance: removed deprecated isInDebugMode parameter from Workmanager initializer (parameter was a no-op; replaced by WorkmanagerDebug handlers).
• Maintenance: upgraded Gradle wrapper 8.13 → 8.14 and Kotlin plugin 2.1.0 → 2.2.20 to satisfy upcoming Flutter minimum version requirements.
• Maintenance: migrated app's own Android build to Built-in Kotlin support (removed explicit id "kotlin-android" from build.gradle). This eliminates the "Your Android app project applies the Kotlin Gradle Plugin" build warning, which would have become a build failure in a future Flutter version.
• Note: third-party plugin KGP warnings (file_picker, video_player, workmanager) remain until their authors publish Built-in Kotlin compatible versions — blocked by a win32 version split in the Flutter plugin ecosystem that will resolve when file_picker 12.0.0 stable ships.
